```python
import openpyxl
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
import argparse

def create_chart(sheet, data_range, title):
    chart = BarChart()
    chart.title = title
    chart.add_data(data_range, titles_from_data=True)
    sheet.add_chart(chart, "E5")

def set_chart_font(chart, font_name):
    for text in chart.series:
        text.graphicalProperties.font = font_name

def generate_report(input_file, output_file):
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(input_file)
    ws = wb.active

    data = Reference(ws, min_col=1, min_row=1, max_col=3, max_row=10)
    create_chart(ws, data, "Monthly Data")

    # Set the font for the chart labels
    chart = ws._charts[0]
    set_chart_font(chart, "Credit Suisse Type Light")

    wb.save(output_file)

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Generate monthly report.')
    parser.add_argument('-c', '--country', required=True, help='Country name')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    input_file = f"{args.country.lower()}_report.xlsx"
    output_file = f"{args.country.lower()}_monthly_report.xlsx"
    generate_report(input_file, output_file)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
